marketing.heroHeading: A personal video greeting from your favourite celebrity
marketing.heroTagline: Birthday, wedding, graduation — for any occasion
marketing.heroDesc: TabrikO is the platform for ordering personalised video and audio greetings from celebrities, bloggers, and athletes. Download the app and get started.
marketing.step0Text: Browse profiles of celebrities and bloggers and check their price.
marketing.step1Text: Describe the occasion and the recipient — the creator makes a personal shout-out.
marketing.step2Text: Within a few days your personalised video greeting arrives on your device.
marketing.creatorsDesc: Over a hundred famous personalities are waiting for you
marketing.why0Text: Supporting local talent and content. The first greeting platform built for Uzbekistan.
marketing.why1Text: Each creator sets their own price — options for every budget.
marketing.why2Text: The platform does one thing: deliver your love through a celebrity.
marketing.why3Text: Most creators complete orders within 24–48 hours.
marketing.faq0Q: How long does a greeting take?
marketing.faq0A: Usually 24–48 hours. For some popular creators it may take a little longer.
marketing.faq1A: Each creator sets their own price, starting from 50,000 UZS.
marketing.faq2Q: Who can I send a greeting to?
marketing.faq2A: A friend, family member, colleague, or yourself — anyone you like.
marketing.faq3Q: What if the creator declines my order?
marketing.faq3A: You'll receive a full refund, no questions asked.
marketing.faq4Q: What format is the greeting in?
marketing.faq4A: Delivered as an MP4 video, quality guaranteed.
marketing.ctaDesc: Download the app and order a personalised greeting from your favourite celebrity.
